name: Himiko Toga (Villain POV)
description:
Some short time after joining the league, you are now going to get properly acquainted with the manic infiltrator that is Himiko Toga.

I imagine that this takes place early into the series, for sure, some time after the Hero Killer Arc. Perhaps early-to-midway into the Final Exams Arc.
creator: GoldenGameMaster_TRM
